fn id() := produce x
---
Fn(name="id", body=Produce(Variable("x")))
==========
fn suspend() := thunk produce x
---
Fn(name="suspend", body=Thunk(Produce(Variable("x"))))
==========
fn resume() := force job
---
Fn(name="resume", body=Force(Variable("job")))
==========
fn choose() := match x { left => produce a, right => produce b }
---
Fn(name="choose", body=Match(scrutinee=Variable("x"), arms=[left => Produce(Variable("a")), right => Produce(Variable("b"))]))
==========
fn pick() := match a { x => produce x }
---
Fn(name="pick", body=Match(scrutinee=Variable("a"), arms=[x => Produce(Variable("x"))]))
==========
fn pick2() := match a { .some(let x) => produce x, .none => produce a }
---
Fn(name="pick2", body=Match(scrutinee=Variable("a"), arms=[. some ( let x ) => Produce(Variable("x")), . none => Produce(Variable("a"))]))
==========
data OptionA { .some(A), .none }
fn mk() := OptionA.some(a)
---
Data(name="OptionA", variants=["some", "none"])
Fn(name="mk", body=Apply(owner="OptionA", member="some", args=[Variable("a")]))
==========
fn main() := let x = y in produce x
---
Fn(name="main", body=Let(name="x", value=Variable("y"), body=Produce(Variable("x"))))
==========
data Option[A] { .some(A), .none }
fn id() := produce a
---
Data(name="Option", variants=["some", "none"])
Fn(name="id", body=Produce(Variable("a")))
==========
data Bool { .true, .false }
fn id() := produce x
fn keep() := let a = b in a
---
Data(name="Bool", variants=["true", "false"])
Fn(name="id", body=Produce(Variable("x")))
Fn(name="keep", body=Let(name="a", value=Variable("b"), body=Variable("a")))
==========
fn main() := let x = let y = z in y in produce x
---
Fn(name="main", body=Let(name="x", value=Let(name="y", value=Variable("z"), body=Variable("y")), body=Produce(Variable("x"))))
==========

data   X   {   .a ,   .b }

  fn   id()   :=   produce   x

---
Data(name="X", variants=["a", "b"])
Fn(name="id", body=Produce(Variable("x")))
==========
fn id() := x
---
Fn(name="id", body=Variable("x"))
==========
fn id() := let x = y in z
---
Fn(name="id", body=Let(name="x", value=Variable("y"), body=Variable("z")))
==========
fn id() := let x = y in produce x
---
Fn(name="id", body=Let(name="x", value=Variable("y"), body=Produce(Variable("x"))))
==========
data Empty { }
---
Data(name="Empty", variants=[])
==========
data One { .only }
---
Data(name="One", variants=["only"])
==========
data Bool { .true, .false }
---
Data(name="Bool", variants=["true", "false"])
==========
data A { .v }
fn f() := produce x
data B { .w, .z }
fn g() := let y = x in y
---
Data(name="A", variants=["v"])
Fn(name="f", body=Produce(Variable("x")))
Data(name="B", variants=["w", "z"])
Fn(name="g", body=Let(name="y", value=Variable("x"), body=Variable("y")))
